narrative_beat: Wide grafico em queda pintado no teto de catedral como fresco, moedas caindo

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a massive financial graph line painted in crimson and gold on the ceiling of a Gothic cathedral as a medieval fresco, showing a dramatic plunge, with gold coins falling from the graph's lowest point like rain
subject.focal_point: the lowest point of the plunging graph where coins cascade
subject.secondary: Two crossed swords painted at the graph's peak. Cathedral nave in monochrome below.
props: two crossed swords at graph peak

environment.location: inside a Gothic cathedral, looking up at the vaulted ceiling
environment.time_of_day: dim interior with golden accent light

composition.foreground: falling gold coins in warm vivid tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white cathedral nave and ribbed vaulting

lighting.key_light: warm golden accent light from unseen source illuminating ceiling fresco
lighting.fill_light: faint amber from gold coins reflecting
lighting.rim_light: gold edge on coin edges during fall

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: the market crash as divine judgement painted in a cathedral
symbolism.secondary: crossed swords as war driving the crash

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
